label: Ritual role
description: Base schema for ritual role objects. Subclass is selected by the Class attribute.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label for this role shown in the ritual assignment dialog.

categoryLabel.label: Category label
categoryLabel.description: Category label shown when this role belongs to a grouped role category.

missingDesc.label: Missing desc
missingDesc.description: Description shown when no valid pawn is found for this role.

noCandidatesGizmoDesc.label: No candidates gizmo desc
noCandidatesGizmoDesc.description: Gizmo description shown when there are no valid candidates for this role.

customChildDisallowMessage.label: Custom child disallow message
customChildDisallowMessage.description: Custom message shown when a child pawn is rejected for this role.

id.label: ID
id.description: String identifier for this role, referenced by stage behaviors and triggers.

precept.label: Precept
precept.description: PreceptDef (role precept) that a pawn must hold to fill this role.

maxCount.label: Max count
maxCount.description: Maximum number of pawns that can fill this role simultaneously. 0 means unlimited.

mergeId.label: Merge ID
mergeId.description: If set, roles with the same mergeId are treated as one role for assignment purposes.

required.label: Required
required.description: If true, a valid pawn must be assigned to this role for the ritual to start.

substitutable.label: Substitutable
substitutable.description: If true, another pawn can substitute for the ideal candidate.

ignoreBleeding.label: Ignore bleeding
ignoreBleeding.description: If true, bleeding does not prevent a pawn from fulfilling this role.

countsAsParticipant.label: Counts as participant
countsAsParticipant.description: If true, this role pawn is counted when computing ritual quality.

addToLord.label: Add to lord
addToLord.description: If true, this role pawn joins the ritual Lord job.

allowNonAggroMentalState.label: Allow non-aggro mental state
allowNonAggroMentalState.description: If true, pawns in a non-aggressive mental state can fill this role.

defaultForSelectedColonist.label: Default for selected colonist
defaultForSelectedColonist.description: If true, the colonist selected when triggering the ritual is pre-assigned to this role.

allowOtherIdeos.label: Allow other ideos
allowOtherIdeos.description: If true, pawns from other ideologies can fill this role.

allowDowned.label: Allow downed
allowDowned.description: If true, downed pawns can be assigned to this role.

allowKeepLayingDown.label: Allow keep laying down
allowKeepLayingDown.description: If true, a pawn assigned to this role may remain lying down during the ritual.

allowChild.label: Allow child
allowChild.description: If true, juvenile pawns can fill this role.

allowBaby.label: Allow baby
allowBaby.description: If true, baby-stage pawns can fill this role.

removeFromAssignmentsOnDeath.label: Remove from assignments on death
removeFromAssignmentsOnDeath.description: If true, the pawn is removed from role assignments when it dies.

endJobOnRitualCleanup.label: End job on ritual cleanup
endJobOnRitualCleanup.description: If true, the pawn's current job is ended when the ritual cleans up.

mustBeAbleToReachTarget.label: Must be able to reach target
mustBeAbleToReachTarget.description: If true, the pawn must be able to path to the ritual target to be eligible.

blocksSocialInteraction.label: Blocks social interaction
blocksSocialInteraction.description: If true, pawns in this role cannot initiate social interactions during the ritual.
